detail.description:
Prepare to battle wave upon wave of relentless enemies as you skilfully merge and upgrade the defences of your cars.

Build out a roster of cars and use them tactically in order to defeat the enemy, collect coins and be victorious!

eventMentions.text: i play this on justplay and it is my new go to my only suggestion would be either more color cars or
i'm giving it 4 ☆ because its fun so far. not sure about the payout. i'll update when i'm sure.
